notes: Official Monarch product capture for TreasuryBench V1.
response:
To figure out the best card for groceries, dining, daycare, Costco, and utilities from your May spending, I need one more choice from you.

Since I can’t see your cards’ reward structures directly, pick how you’d like to move forward:

What would you like me to do next so I can help you optimize card usage based on your May 2026 spending?

Pull my May 1–31, 2026 spending by category and merchant (Groceries, Restaurants & Bars, Child Care/Childcare, Utilities, Costco/wholesale clubs) so we can analyze patterns.
I’ll list my current credit cards and their rewards/perks; then analyze how my May 1–31, 2026 spending should be mapped to each card.
Just show my May 1–31, 2026 spending by category only (no merchant or card-level detail).
Just list my current credit cards from Monarch with balances, limits, and utilization as of today, June 5, 2026.

Reply with the option number (1, 2, 3, or 4) and I’ll take it from there.
